themes.exampleQuote: As soon as you open the door, you're hit with that amazing fresh coffee bean smell.
Eric helped me out and went out of his way to make sure I had the grinder on the right setting.
You can smell each one and even bag your own beans, which is a really unique touch.
They have multiple taps with different varieties, which makes it fun to mix things up.
Their espresso blend is hands down one of the best beans I've put through my espresso maker.
Prices are very reasonable, especially for the quality and experience you're getting.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers rave about the immersive bean-shop atmosphere, standout coffee quality, and staff who go out of their way to help — with virtually no nitpicks surfacing across the reviews.
notable_quote: Most coffee gives me a terrible aftertaste and I had coffee at work and it turns out to be Allegheny coffee's house blend. It was the best I've ever had!
